### Product Information

- Eco friendly rinseless wash solution!

- SiO2 infused for protection

- Enhances gloss and leaves behind a slick finish

- Product Code: GY-7833

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 7 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The Gyeon Eco Wash is an SiO2 infused waterless and rinseless wash solution! This concentrated, eco-friendly wash tackles dirt and grime while offering several ways to fit into your washing routine. Gyeon Eco Wash eliminates the need for a traditional hose and bucket wash. This water saving formula lets you wash your car while minimizing runoff. You can use Eco Wash in three ways: for a quick waterless wash, a more thorough rinseless wash, or even as a drying aid to add shine and water repellency. For an extra touch of protection, Gyeon Eco Wash is infused with SiO2. This special ingredient adds gloss, repels water, and even offers mild self-cleaning properties, so future washes are easier. Using gentle cleaners this formula is also safe for all car paint finishes, including those protected with a ceramic coating. The concentrated formula means a little goes a long way, making it an economical option as well. Whether you are a car enthusiast or a detailer looking for a convenient, eco-friendly wash, Gyeon Eco Wash is a perfect choice.



**Dilution Options:**



- Waterless Wash: 1:10 - 1:15

- Rinseless Wash: 1:256 - 1:150

- Drying Aid: 1:20

### From The Label

#### Product Description

SiO2 infused Rinseless and waterless wash. Great as a drying aid or anti-static wipe on events. Leaves a slick, glossy and enhanced finish.


**


- Slick for maximum safety

- Glossy and streak free finish

- Reduce water usage
**


#### Directions

**Waterless Wash:** Dilute 1:10/1:15. Spray liberally on the surface. Wipe in a straight line motion till streak-free finish.



**Rinseless:** Use 50-80 ml in 12 L of water. Soak multiple MF in your wash solution. Wash panel by panel. Change towels often.



**Drying Aid:** Dilute 1:20. Spray on a wet surface or in your drying towel and dry the surface.



** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Jon G. on 10/4/2025

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I bought this to use as a drying aid at 20:1. It works great, is very slick and provides a great finish. It adds some hydrophobic qualities to my coating and gives me a deep, streak free finish. Very economical compared to a RTU drying aid. No significant smell but I would say its pleasant if any.

Reviewed by Joe D. on 10/20/2024

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Recently applied CanCoat and wanted to try a new rinseless wash. Read many positives on Eco Wash and it didn't disappoint. Mixed easily and did a very good job removing dirt.

Very happy so far and looking forward to seeing how it handles a New England winter.

Reviewed by Souky K. on 10/14/2024

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Simply a top-shelf rinseless. Its ability to clean both traffic film off the paint, glass, and wash media is superb. The key lime scent is pleasant, and not overwhelming. Quite punchy as a waterless wash. Also quite effective on glass at 1:16. Pass the sunrise/sunset test, unlike other waterless & quick detailer mixes from competing brands which tends to leave haze/film - nice in the shade, but a hot mess when sunlight hits.



Here's a major point which made this rinseless stands out in my arsenal (8 rinseless): Its ability to remain shiny & relatively dust free for a long period.



All my other rinseless on the shelf would look good for about 2 to 3 days and then the shine and cleanliness would sharply drop off. Some look great and glossy after the initial wash, but becomes a dust magnet within 12 hrs. Not Eco Wash. The paint might not be as crisp as the first day, but damn good through out the remaining week after performing a rinseless. Impressive.



Gyeon has themselves a winner here. I love it so and picked up 10 total bottles of the 1000 ml. Four for myself, and the rest as gifts to friends & family members.

[Read all customer reviews of Gyeon Eco Wash](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Eco-Wash-P3564/Reviews/)

[** Write your own review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Eco-Wash-P3564/Reviews/#write)
